global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a product and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on a product with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid blue background occupying the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center showcasing a product with a light blue background.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: Another rectangular area in the center, slightly overlapping with the previous one, also featuring a light blue background.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area in the center, positioned below the previous elements, with a light blue background.

elements.label: Additional area
elements.description: A narrow rectangular area in the center, possibly for additional content, with a light blue background.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Bold white text in the center stating 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' against a light blue background.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with white text 'Order now' on a light blue background.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in white.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner with the text 'UGC' in white.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, discount offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the product display areas are in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25, €19.99, Order now, LuxShelf, UGC
